no_solution_leakage.reason: The instruction describes WHAT needs to change (add new field, deprecate old one, add warnings, update tests) but does not give exact code diffs, line numbers to change, or verbatim replacement text. A developer must still reason about the implementation.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check behavioral outcomes: helm template rendering of VCTs, schema structure via JSON parsing, AST-based detection of parametrized tests. They use unique test values (behav-test-vol, legacy-test-vol) not from the gold patch. Alternative correct implementations (different comment wording, different deprecation message phrasing, different test organization) would pass as long as they achieve the same behavior.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests execute helm template via subprocess, parse YAML/JSON structured data, and use Python AST parsing to inspect test files. The test_worker.py/test_worker_sets.py checks use AST walking rather than text grep. Schema tests parse JSON and navigate property trees. This is behavioral verification, not text matching.

test_not_tautological.reason: A stub/NOP implementation would fail: test_celery_volume_claim_templates_exists checks workers.celery.volumeClaimTemplates == [] (doesn't exist in base), test_deprecation_warning_in_notes checks rendered helm output for DEPRECATION WARNING when legacy VCT is set (no such warning in base NOTES.txt), test_celery_volume_claim_templates_in_schema checks schema has the new property (absent in base). These all fail on the unmodified codebase.

behavior_in_tests.reason: All 7 acceptance criteria are tested: new field in values.yaml (test_celery_volume_claim_templates_exists), legacy deprecation (test_legacy_volume_claim_templates_deprecated_comment), JSON schema (TestValuesSchema class), NOTES.txt warning (TestNotesTxt class), newsfragment (TestNewsfragment class in truncated tests), test updates (TestHelmTests class), and chart validity (TestChartValidity class).

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are well-organized into descriptive classes (TestValuesYaml, TestValuesSchema, TestNotesTxt, TestHelmTests) with clear docstrings and meaningful test method names. The module docstring explains the testing approach.

structured_data_schema.reason: The instruction specifies the JSON schema structure (volumeClaimTemplates as array type, examples with data-volume-1/2, io.k8s.api.core.v1.PersistentVolumeClaimTemplate definition) and YAML structure (workers.celery.volumeClaimTemplates defaulting to []).

no_typos.reason: All file paths, variable names, schema keys, and commands in the instruction are correct and consistent with the codebase and test expectations.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: The instruction names files that are domain-obvious for a Helm chart deprecation task (values.yaml, schema, NOTES.txt, test files, newsfragments). It doesn't specify exact line numbers or verbatim code to insert, just behavioral requirements.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: The gold patch makes localized additions to specific sections of values.yaml, values.schema.json, NOTES.txt, and test files. Changes are scoped additions (new fields, new deprecation blocks, new parametrize cases) without full-file rewrites.
